---
title: "kidney"
---

```{=html}
<style>
.research-nav{
    display:flex;
    justify-content:center;
    gap:20px;
    margin:30px 0;flex-wrap:wrap;
}

.research-nav a,
.research-nav .active-tab {
  padding: 10px 22px;
  border: 2px solid #2ca25f;
  border-radius: 999px;
  text-decoration: none;
  min-width: 120px;          /* ← 固定最小宽度 */
  text-align: center;
}

.research-nav a{
    color:#2ca25f;
}

.research-nav a:hover{
    background:#2ca25f;
    color:white;
}

</style>
```

::: research-nav
[Overview](research.qmd)

[Kidney Disease]{.active-tab}

[Single-cell Genomics](genomics.qmd)

[Disease Modeling](modeling.qmd)
:::

## Kidney Disease Mechanisms

::::: columns
::: {.column width="60%"}
We study genetic and molecular mechanisms driving kidney diseases, including cyst formation, epithelial dysfunction, and cellular remodeling.
:::

::: {.column width="40%"}
![](images/g.jpg)
:::
:::::

<div class="project-title">🔬 Kidney Disease</div>

<div class="project-card">
  abc
</div>

<div class="project-subtitle">abc</div>

<ul>
  <li>abc</li>
  <li>abc二</li>
</ul>


Research Overview

<div class="project-title">Kidney Disease</div><div class="project-card"> Our research focuses on understanding the molecular mechanisms underlying kidney disease. We combine advanced genomic approaches with organoid models to dissect disease pathways and identify therapeutic targets. </div><div class="project-subtitle">Key Approaches</div><div class="project-card"> <ul> <li>Kidney organoid culture and differentiation</li> <li>Single-cell RNA sequencing</li> <li>CRISPR-based functional screening</li> </ul> </div><div class="section-divider"></div><div class="project-title">Single-cell Genomics</div><div class="project-card"> a </div><div class="project-title">Disease Modeling</div><div class="project-card"> b </div> ```
